name: personal-rec
description: Personal recommendation system for OpenClaw — LLM-powered feed search during conversations

scripts.deploy: npm run build && mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/extensions/personal-rec/dist && rsync -av --delete dist/ ~/.openclaw/extensions/personal-rec/dist/ && cp package.json openclaw.plugin.json ~/.openclaw/extensions/personal-rec/ && cd ~/.openclaw/extensions/personal-rec && npm install --omit=dev --ignore-scripts
scripts.restart: npm run deploy && openclaw gateway restart
